metadata.description: Open skills marketplace by Saifullah Panca — hosts the zone spec-driven development pipeline (v1 multi-file stable, v2 subagent-driven single-file). More plugins to come.

plugins.name: zone
plugins.description: Spec-driven development pipeline — /zone takes an idea from brief to shipped PR autonomously. Seven phases: brief, spec, plan, implement, review, test, ship.

plugins.name: zone-v2
plugins.description: Spec-driven development pipeline (subagent-driven) — /zone-v2 orchestrates three sub-skills: coach-brief (brief/spec/plan), 3o3-play (implement/review/test), shoot-play (mini-review/ship). Run the full pipeline or each phase independently. Six player personas (players/) dispatched by sub-skills. State in .claude/zone-v2/, Notion opt-in (--notion). Runs side by side with v1.
